stemHtml:
Given the following data for the pre-flight calculations, determine the required Alternate Fuel for a Commercial Air Transport flight. Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Fuel for a missed approach at destination: 280 kg
Fuel for the climb to cruise level: 900 kg
Cruise distance to the alternate: 230 NM
Cruise fuel consumption: 6.5 kg / NAM
Fuel for the descent to the alternate: 125 Kg
Fuel for the Approach and Landing at the Alternate: 220 kg
Holding fuel flow at the alternate: 2000 kg /h
Fuel for a missed approach at the alternate: 230 kg
Extra Fuel: 0 kg
Discretionary Fuel: 0 kg
